summary: Tested all 3 bug fixes and new features: 1) Admin panel flex-wrap working, 2) Mira Picks resolvePickImage filters static.prod-images 403 URLs, 3) ServiceCard with Send to Concierge + service desk ticket creation. All 12 backend tests passing (100%). All critical UI flows verified.

ui_bugs.issue: ProductCard in Mira's Picks modal has 16/20 img tags with static.prod-images.emergentagent.com src attributes. ProductCard.onError fallback handles them (no broken images visible), but the static.prod-images URLs are still in the DOM. The DineContentModal image enrichment at lines 641-642 and 654 does not apply resolvePickImage filter for products. Only ServiceCard image resolution skips 403 URLs.

admin_panel_flex_wrap.details: All 8 master control buttons (MASTER SYNC, VERIFY DATA, FIX IMAGES, FIX PROD DATA, CONSOLIDATE DATA, COMPARE, AI IMAGES, SYNC → PROD) visible and wrapping to 2 rows. No horizontal scroll (scrollWidth === clientWidth === 1280).

mira_picks_section.details: MiraPicksSection shows 16 pick cards (mix of PRODUCT and SERVICE). 0 static.prod-images.emergentagent.com URLs in rendered images. 15 gradient fallback elements (services without valid images). resolvePickImage working correctly.

service_card_send_to_concierge.details: 5 ServiceCard 'Send to Concierge →' buttons found in Mira's Picks modal. Service cards display with SERVICE badge, AI score, gradient fallback for unavailable images.

product_card_in_modal.details: ProductCard renders with 'View Details' button. Clicking opens ProductDetailModal with '+ Include' cart action (miraContext mode). Cart functionality accessible.

dine_category_strip_pills.details: Soul Picks and Mira's Picks pills visible in DineCategoryStrip. Both open modals correctly.

service_desk_ticket.details: POST /api/service_desk/attach_or_create_ticket creates ticket with TCK-YYYY-NNNNNN format. Idempotent - second call with same parent/pet/pillar attaches to existing ticket (is_new=False).

claude_picks_endpoint.details: GET /api/mira/claude-picks/pet-mojo-7327ad56?entity_type=service returns 200 with picks array. Endpoint healthy.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Apply resolvePickImage filter to product image enrichment in DineContentModal.jsx lines 641-642 and 654 so that static.prod-images.emergentagent.com URLs are not passed to ProductCard img src (currently onError fallback handles this gracefully but better to filter earlier)
critical_code_review_comments: DineContentModal.jsx: Product image enrichment at lines 641-642 (`image: scoreById[p.id].image_url || ...`) and line 654 (`image: p.image_url || p.image`) still passes static.prod-images.emergentagent.com URLs to ProductCard. ServiceCard correctly filters these at lines 133-136. Recommend applying same filter to products.
DineSoulPage.jsx resolvePickImage only used in MiraPicksSection (horizontal scroll section), not in the DineContentModal when modal is opened via pills - intentional design split.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows working, minor note on ProductCard image filtering in modal)

test_credentials: User: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123, Admin: aditya / lola4304
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs fixed and verified: 1) Admin panel Master Controls buttons wrap to next line (flex-wrap class at line 3308 of Admin.jsx, no horizontal scroll). 2) MiraPicksSection resolvePickImage filters static.prod-images 403 URLs (0 forbidden in rendered imgs). 3) ServiceCard in DineContentModal shows 'Send to Concierge →' button. Service desk POST endpoint creates TCK-format tickets with idempotent attach behavior. ProductCard shows 'View Details' → '+ Include' flow (not direct 'Add to Cart' on card - this is by design). Minor: DineContentModal product enrichment still passes static.prod-images URLs to ProductCard img src (handled by onError fallback).
mocked_apis_noted: Pet-friendly restaurant spots are MOCK data

Products without AI-generated images show branded gradient placeholder (INTENTIONAL - backend returns static.prod-images URLs that 403, frontend filters in MiraPicksSection via resolvePickImage, ProductCard uses onError fallback in modal)
